name: modelpipe
description: Passthrough Anthropic-format model router: route any model-bearing call from an Anthropic-format client to a chosen backend. No translator.

scripts.test: node test/router.test.mjs && node test/stats.test.mjs && node test/compact.test.mjs && node test/compact-integration.test.mjs && node test/concurrency.test.mjs && node test/account-cooldown.test.mjs && node test/profiles.test.mjs && node test/migrate.test.mjs && node test/failover-retry.test.mjs

author: Alexander Degtyarev
